allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add IEP/504 accommodations, fix scatter plot, clean up Grade UI

Features:
- Add FERPA-compliant IEP/504 accommodation system with 8 presets
- Accommodation presets: Simplified Language, Effort-Focused, Extra
  Encouragement, Chunked Feedback, Modified Expectations, Visual
  Structure, Read-Aloud Friendly, Growth Mindset
- Student accommodation management UI in Settings tab
- CSV import/export for bulk accommodation assignments
- Accommodation badge \(heart icon\) on results for IEP students
- Only accommodation TYPE sent to AI, never student identity

Fixes:
- Fix scatter plot legend overlapping with X-axis label
- Fix scatter plot tooltip text color in dark mode \(was black on dark\)
- Expand Y-axis domain to show high growth values \(up to 100\)

UI Improvements:
- Remove redundant Answer Markers section from Grade tab
- Remove redundant Marker Library from Grade tab
- Markers now managed exclusively in Assignment Builder

Documentation:
- Add IEP/504 section to PITCH_DECK.md
- Add IEP/504 section to User_Manual.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /Users/alexc/Downloads/Graider/backend/data && for f in standards_fl_*.json; do echo "=== $f ===" && python3 -c "
import json
with open\('$f'\) as fh:
    data = json.load\(fh\)
    standards = data if isinstance\(data, list\) else data.get\('standards', []\)
    codes = [s.get\('code',''\) for s in standards]
    print\(f'  Total standards: {len\(codes\)}'\)
    # Show unique prefixes \(e.g. SS.8.A.1, SS.8.A.2, etc.\)
    prefixes = sorted\(set\('.'.join\(c.split\('.'\)[:4]\) for c in codes if c\)\)
    print\(f'  Code prefixes \({len\(prefixes\)}\): {prefixes[:20]}'\)
    if len\(prefixes\) > 20: print\(f'    ... and {len\(prefixes\)-20} more'\)
    # Show all codes
    print\(f'  All codes: {sorted\(codes\)[:30]}'\)
    if len\(codes\) > 30: print\(f'    ... and {len\(codes\)-30} more'\)
"; done)

Bash(for f in backend/data/standards_fl_*.json; do echo "=== $f ==="; python3 -c "
import json
with open\('$f'\) as fp:
    data = json.load\(fp\)
if isinstance\(data, list\):
    standards = data
    fmt = 'flat array'
else:
    standards = data.get\('standards', []\)
    fmt = f'wrapped dict \(grade={data.get\(\\"grade\\",\\"?\\"\)}, subject={data.get\(\\"subject\\",\\"?\\"\)}\)'
codes = [s.get\('code',''\) for s in standards]
# Extract unique grade-level prefixes
grades = set\(\)
for c in codes:
    parts = c.split\('.'\)
    if len\(parts\) >= 2:
        grades.add\(parts[1]\)
has_course = any\(s.get\('course'\) for s in standards\)
print\(f'  Format: {fmt}'\)
print\(f'  Total standards: {len\(standards\)}'\)
print\(f'  Grade levels in codes: {sorted\(grades\)}'\)
print\(f'  Has course field: {has_course}'\)
print\(f'  First code: {codes[0] if codes else \\"none\\"}'\)
print\(f'  Last code: {codes[-1] if codes else \\"none\\"}'\)
"; done)

Bash(git add backend/storage.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix CSV period files parsed as JSON, retry Supabase on Errno 35

- Period CSV files were routed through json.load\(\), causing
  "Expecting value" errors. Now read/write as raw text.
- Add single retry with 0.5s delay on "Resource temporarily
  unavailable" Supabase errors \(startup connection burst\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main)
